## Checklist
- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main` (I ran `git merge main`)
- [ ] I tested this change manually at least once
- [ ] I did NOT commit my `.env` or any API keys
- [ ] I updated the README or model card if this changes how something works
- [ ] My commit messages follow the format `layer1: ...` / `voice: ...` / etc.
